name: Schmidt Salzman & Moran, Ltd
message: With 35 years of practice in real estate taxation, Schmidt Salzman & Moran, Ltd. aggressively pursues the lowest possible real estate taxes for its clients’ commercial, industrial and multi-unit residential properties. This company has not given us even the lowest price for their customers' personal information. If they don't need it, we are sure there are many of you who are interested.More that 70GB will be uploaded soon.
